title: Design Materialized Projections & Snapshots
description: Design materialized projections to efficiently query the current state in event-sourced systems. Optimize read performance by maintaining up-to-date views and strategic snapshots of data derived from an event log.
objectives: Design materialized projections to efficiently query the current state in event-sourced systems.
Optimize read performance by maintaining up-to-date views and strategic snapshots of data derived from an event log.
